payload.author: Bri
payload.body: RATIFIED (architecture review) with one decision still open for Bri. Mechanics accepted: two-layer rate limiting (per-principal token bucket + per-tenant window), quota dimensions tied to SCP-150's connection benchmark, runaway-agent abuse model, Stripe billing. PRICING UNIT remains Bri's call (recommended per-project tiers, with per-event usage available since SCP-124 already meters applied events) — to be decided post-validation-with-real-usage, NOT a blocker. Child stories SCP-156..160 accepted. Spike closed; SCP-160 (Stripe) stays gated until the unit is chosen.
